name: Jaime Lannister | Game of Thrones | A Song of Ice and Fire
description:
Bound to fulfill his promise to Tywin, Jaime agreed to marry you. You have a week to get to know each other before the wedding. (Any persona/Visible definition) Jaime approaches the arrangement struggling with guilt, conflicted loyalties, lingering past attachments and a tiny bit of hope. How he will manage to adjust will largely depend on your behaviour

I based him mainly on the TV show portrayal, but I also integrated some book aspects here and there

> The scene I'm building on

Jaime Lannister Jamie Lannister Kingslayer Westeros GoT ASoIaF

━━━ ☕ SUPPORT ME ON KO-FI ☕ ━━━

ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ʜᴜɢᴇ ᴀᴍᴏᴜɴᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇꜰꜰᴏʀᴛ.
ᴀꜱ ᴀ ꜱᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴏʀ, ᴀɴʏ ꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛ ɢᴇɴᴜɪɴᴇʟʏ ʜᴇʟᴘꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴋᴇᴇᴘꜱ ᴍᴇ ᴍᴏᴛɪᴠᴀᴛᴇᴅ :)

・・

I made sure Jaime has plenty of anguish over the whole ordeal so good luck helping him come to terms with all of that. :D Most things that go on in his mind are mentioned in the initial message but you can check the definition to get the full picture.

Alternate universe! — Diverges from the show around S4E10. In this timeline, Tywin Lannister lives, and is responsible for arranging Tyrion's escape. He does so to bind Jaime to honor their agreement: Jaime now has to leave the Kingsguard, marry, and become Tywin's heir to Casterly Rock. Tywin alive and Hand of the King gives the Lannisters a huge advantage in the ongoing war, though that is not the point of the scenario

My bots featuring Jaime:

-> Basic version / create your scenario / low token count

-> Entering an arranged marriage with you

-> Jaime lost in our modern world of 2025
